'''pafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:swirlingly|swirlingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swirlingly|swirlingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pafate|pafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafatesher|pafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafatesherĂ«m|pafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafatero|pafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafateshĂ«|pafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafateshĂ«m|pafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafatero|gokipafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafateshĂ«|gokipafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafateshĂ«m|gokipafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafankerom|gopafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafankeshĂ«|gopafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafankeshĂ«m|gopafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafankeya|gopafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafaterom|pafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafatemu|pafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafateya|pafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafaterom|gokipafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafatemu|gokipafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafateya|gokipafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafafate|pafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafafatesher|pafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafafatesherĂ«m|pafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafafatero|pafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafafateshĂ«|pafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafafateshĂ«m|pafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafafatero|gokipafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafafateshĂ«|gokipafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafafateshĂ«m|gokipafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafafankerom|gopafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafafankeshĂ«|gopafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafafankeshĂ«m|gopafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafafankeya|gopafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafafaterom|pafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafafatemu|pafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafafateya|pafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafafaterom|gokipafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafafatemu|gokipafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafafateya|gokipafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠfĂŠte|pĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠfĂŠtesher|pĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠfĂŠtero|pĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠfĂŠtero|gokipĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠfĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠfĂŠterom|pĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠfĂŠtemu|pĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠfĂŠteya|pĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠfĂŠterom|gokipĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠfĂŠteya|gokipĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:paffafte|paffafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:paffaftesher|paffaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:paffaftesherĂ«m|paffaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:paffaftero|paffaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:paffafteshĂ«|paffafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:paffafteshĂ«m|paffafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipaffaftero|gokipaffaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipaffafteshĂ«|gokipaffafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipaffafteshĂ«m|gokipaffafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopaffafnkerom|gopaffafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopaffafnkeshĂ«|gopaffafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopaffafnkeshĂ«m|gopaffafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopaffafnkeya|gopaffafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:paffafterom|paffafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:paffaftemu|paffaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:paffafteya|paffafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipaffafterom|gokipaffafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipaffaftemu|gokipaffaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipaffafteya|gokipaffafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
